briefdescription.para: List devices in given hdf5 file.
return name of electrode

parameterdescription.para: full path to file in Igor disc path notation
Full Path inside HDF5 structure to TimeSeries group

simplesect.para: the name of the electrode or "" for unassociated channels

briefdescription.para: List groups inside /general/labnotebook.

simplesect.para: list with name of all groups inside /general/labnotebook/*

briefdescription.para: List all acquisition channels.
List all stimulus channels.
List all stimsets.

simplesect.para: comma separated list of contents of the stimset group

briefdescription.para: Try to extract information from channel name string.

parameterdescription.para: Input channel name in form data_00000_TTL1_3

briefdescription.para: Read parameters from source attribute.

detaileddescription.para:
Function is NWBv1 specific
LoadSweepNumber
locationID
HDF5 group specified channel is a member of
channel
channel to load
p
ReadChannelParams structure to get filled

briefdescription.para: Load sweep number from specified channel name.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group containing channel
name of channel for which sweep number is loaded

briefdescription.para: Load data wave from specified path.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group containing channel id can also be of an open nwb file. In this case specify (optional) path.
name of channel for which data attribute is loaded
use path to specify group inside hdf5 file where ./channel/data is located.

simplesect.para: reference to free wave containing loaded data

briefdescription.para: Load single TimeSeries data as a wave from NWB_PATCHCLAMPSERIES_V[12].

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group or file
name or path of TimeSeries for which data is loaded

simplesect.para: reference to wave containing loaded data

briefdescription.para: Load single TimeSeries data as a wave from NWB_STIMULUS_PRESENTATION.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group or file
name or path of TimeSeries for which data is loaded

simplesect.para: reference to wave containing loaded data

briefdescription.para: Open hdf5 group containing acquisition channels.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group or file

briefdescription.para: Open hdf5 group containing stimulus channels.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group or file

briefdescription.para: Open hdf5 group containing stimsets.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group or file

briefdescription.para: Check if the path to the stimsets exist in the NWB file.
Read in all NWB datasets from the root group ('/')
Read in all standard NWB datasets from the group '/general'.
Read in all NWB datasets from the root group '/general/subject'.
Read the TimeSeries properties from the given group in locationID.
Read nwb data type.

parameterdescription.para: Path to element who's DataType is queried

simplesect.para: string with data type (e.g. uint, DynamicTable, SweepTable)

briefdescription.para: Return the two SweepTable data columns sweep_number and series

xrefdescription.para: Allow Executions for files with missing SweepTable entry using LoadSweepNumber

simplesect.para: sweep_number and path to TimeSeries as waves

briefdescription.para: Return the epoch table as wave reference wave.

detaileddescription.para: Due to IP limitations, the NWB file path of the closed file must be passed.
See GetEpochsWaveInternal() for the wave layout.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, WaveText timeseries, string name, string attrName=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: GetTimeseriesProperties

briefdescription.para: Return timeseries properties which can be a dataset or attribute as wave.
Return a free wave reference wave.

detaileddescription.para:
ROWS:
One entry for each unique timeseries path, with dimension label
Each row will hold a Nx4 wave for the epoch info of each row.

briefdescription.para: Expand data from rugged DynamicTable column entry.
Generic functions related to import from the NeuroDataWithoutBorders format.
